phrases.intent_en: Where is The Kiss by Klimt in Upper Belvedere?
phrases.text_local: Wo finde ich Klimts Bild „Der Kuss“?
phrases.cultural_note: In Austrian museums, Klimt’s works are typically displayed in prominent rooms on the main floors.

likely_response.local: Im Oberen Belvedere, im ersten Stock.
likely_response.translation_en: In the Upper Belvedere, on the first floor.

responses.english: In the Upper Belvedere, on the first floor.
responses.local: Im Oberen Belvedere, im ersten Stock.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I get the special exhibition tickets?
phrases.text_local: Wo gibt es Tickets für Sonderausstellungen?
phrases.cultural_note: Special exhibition tickets are typically sold at the main ticket counters in the Upper Belvedere; combined tickets may be available.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket desk in the Upper Belvedere.

responses.english: At the ticket desk in the Upper Belvedere.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Orangery open for visitors today?
phrases.cultural_note: Austrian museums and their ancillary buildings (like the Orangery) often have separate opening hours; visitors should check the official site for daily updates.

phrases.intent_en: Are gallery walkers allowed in the Lower Belvedere?
phrases.text_local: Dürfen Besucher mit Gehhilfen in den Unteren Belvedere?
phrases.cultural_note: Austrian museums strive for accessibility; the Lower Belvedere, as a historic palace, has limited accessibility but offers support where possible.
